Class Validation

java.lang.Object
Validation
public class Validation extends Object
Utility class that provides static validation methods for the safari program. It cannot be instantiated and is used to validate input data throughout the program.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    isNonNegativeNumber(int number)
    Checks if a number is non-negative (zero or greater).
    static boolean
    isValidAggressionLevel(String aggressionLevel)
    Checks if an aggression level matches a known aggression constant.
    static boolean
    isValidAnimal(Animal animal)
    Checks if an animal object is not null.
    static boolean
    isValidDiet(String diet)
    Checks if a diet matches a known diet constant.
    static boolean
    isValidIdentity(int identity)
    Checks if an identity number is valid.
    static boolean
    isValidLocationChoice(int choice, int numberOfLocations)
    Checks if a location choice is within the available range.
    static boolean
    isValidLocationNumber(int locationNumber)
    Checks if a location number is valid (greater than 0).
    static boolean
    isValidName(String name)
    Checks if a name is valid (not null and not blank).
    static boolean
    isValidSightingLine(String[] lineContent)
    Checks if a sighting line has the correct number of fields (exactly 6).
    static boolean
    isValidSpecies(Species species)
    Checks if a species object is not null.
    static boolean
    isValidTourChoice(int choice)
    Checks if a tour choice is valid (between 1 and 3 inclusive).
    static boolean
    isValidTouristCount(int numberOfTourist)
    Checks if a tourist count is valid (between 1 and 4 inclusive).
    static boolean
    isValidType(String type)
    Checks if an animal type matches a known type constant.

  • Method Details

    • isValidIdentity

      public static boolean isValidIdentity(int identity)
      Checks if an identity number is valid.
      Parameters:
      identity - the identity number to validate as an int.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidLocationNumber

      public static boolean isValidLocationNumber(int locationNumber)
      Checks if a location number is valid (greater than 0).
      Parameters:
      locationNumber - the location number to validate as an int.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidName

      public static boolean isValidName(String name)
      Checks if a name is valid (not null and not blank).
      Parameters:
      name - the name to validate as a String.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidType

      public static boolean isValidType(String type)
      Checks if an animal type matches a known type constant.
      Parameters:
      type - the animal type to validate as a String.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidDiet

      public static boolean isValidDiet(String diet)
      Checks if a diet matches a known diet constant.
      Parameters:
      diet - the diet to validate as a String.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidAggressionLevel

      public static boolean isValidAggressionLevel(String aggressionLevel)
      Checks if an aggression level matches a known aggression constant.
      Parameters:
      aggressionLevel - the aggression level to validate as a String.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidSpecies

      public static boolean isValidSpecies(Species species)
      Checks if a species object is not null.
      Parameters:
      species - the Species object to validate.
      Returns:
      true if not null, otherwise false.

    • isValidAnimal

      public static boolean isValidAnimal(Animal animal)
      Checks if an animal object is not null.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal object to validate.
      Returns:
      true if not null, otherwise false.

    • isValidSightingLine

      public static boolean isValidSightingLine(String[] lineContent)
      Checks if a sighting line has the correct number of fields (exactly 6).
      Parameters:
      lineContent - the parsed sighting line as a String array.
      Returns:
      true if not null and contains 6 elements, otherwise false.

    • isNonNegativeNumber

      public static boolean isNonNegativeNumber(int number)
      Checks if a number is non-negative (zero or greater).
      Parameters:
      number - the number to validate as an int.
      Returns:
      true if non-negative, otherwise false.

    • isValidTouristCount

      public static boolean isValidTouristCount(int numberOfTourist)
      Checks if a tourist count is valid (between 1 and 4 inclusive).
      Parameters:
      numberOfTourist - the number of tourists to validate as an int.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidTourChoice

      public static boolean isValidTourChoice(int choice)
      Checks if a tour choice is valid (between 1 and 3 inclusive).
      Parameters:
      choice - the tour choice to validate as an int.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.

    • isValidLocationChoice

      public static boolean isValidLocationChoice(int choice, int numberOfLocations)
      Checks if a location choice is within the available range.
      Parameters:
      choice - the selected location index as an int.
      numberOfLocations - the total number of available locations as an int.
      Returns:
      true if valid, otherwise false.
